name: Sacred Lute
effects: Party Effect: Within 4 squares Inspired for 4 seconds.Party Effect: Within 4 squares VIT Boost (+15 VIT) for 4 seconds.Regular Totem: Spawn a 3000HP totem for 12 seconds unless it’s destroyed that taunts nearby enemies, deals 100 damage to enemies within 5 sqrs every 3 seconds and buffs projectile speed and range.Upgraded Totem: Combined with the Ritualistic Pa’u or Tiki Pendant, the totem grows larger in size, has 4500HP, deals 200 damage to enemies within 5 sqrs every 3 seconds and increases projectile speed and range slightly more.Ascendant Totem: Combined with the Ritualistic Pa’u and Tiki Pendant, the totem grows larger in size, has 6000HP, deals 300 damage to enemies within 5 sqrs every 3 seconds and increases projectile speed and range even more.
Party Effect: Within 4 squares Inspired for 4 seconds.
